title: Login system not working for multiple users
description: Our team cannot access the system and we have a deadline today. Multiple users are affected. Please help ASAP!
resolution_notes: Resolved by updating authentication middleware. Added retry logic for token validation.

title: Database performance degradation during peak hours
description: Our API response times are 5x slower than normal between 2-4 PM daily. This is affecting our customers.

title: Security vulnerability reported in authentication module
description: Our security audit found a potential JWT token validation bypass. This needs immediate attention!
resolution_notes: Security patch applied (v2.3.1). Updated JWT library to fix validation bypass. All sessions invalidated as precaution.

title: Feature request: Add dark mode to dashboard
description: Would be great to have a dark mode option for the dashboard. Many of our team members work late hours.

title: Export functionality for reports in Excel format
description: We need to export our monthly reports to Excel for board presentations. CSV is not sufficient.
resolution_notes: Implemented Excel export using OpenXML SDK. Supports formatting, formulas, and charts. Available in v3.2.0.

title: API rate limiting too restrictive for our use case
description: Current limit of 100 requests/minute is blocking our integration. We need at least 500/minute for our batch processing.
resolution_notes: Increased rate limit from 100 to 500 req/min for Enterprise tier. Customer notified of change.

title: Question: How to set up SSO with Azure AD?
description: We're trying to configure SSO with Azure AD but the documentation is unclear. Can someone guide us through the process?
resolution_notes: Provided step-by-step SSO guide with screenshots. Customer confirmed successful setup. Closing ticket.

title: Billing discrepancy - charged for wrong tier
description: We were charged for the Enterprise tier but we're on the Professional plan. Please review and refund the difference.
resolution_notes: Billing corrected and refund processed. Invoice #INV-2024-0882 adjusted. Customer notified via email.

title: Request for custom training session for our team
description: We have 50 new users joining next month. Would like to schedule a custom training session covering advanced features.

title: Mobile app crashes on iOS 17 devices
description: The app crashes immediately on launch for all iOS 17 users. This is affecting about 30% of our user base.
resolution_notes: Fixed iOS 17 compatibility issue in v3.1.2. Updated SwiftUI navigation and deprecated API calls.

title: Cannot access admin panel after recent update
description: After the latest update, our admin team can no longer access the admin panel. Getting 403 errors.
resolution_notes: Admin panel access restored by clearing corrupted cache entries. Added monitoring to prevent recurrence.

title: Webhook endpoints returning 500 errors intermittently
description: Our webhook integrations are failing with 500 errors. This is happening randomly about 20% of the time.

title: Need help configuring multi-tenant setup
description: We need to set up our workspace for multi-tenant use. Our team manages 3 different client organizations.
resolution_notes: Multi-tenant configuration guide sent. Tenant isolation verified. Database schemas separated correctly.

title: Data migration failed during weekend maintenance
description: Our scheduled data migration failed on Saturday. We need to restore from backup and retry.
resolution_notes: Migration re-run from backup. All 47,000 records restored successfully. Validation checks passed.

title: Password reset emails not being delivered
description: Users are requesting password resets but not receiving the emails. Checked spam folders.
resolution_notes: Email provider configuration updated. SPF/DKIM records verified. Delivery rate restored to 99.8%.

title: Two-factor authentication not working with authenticator app
description: Our team cannot log in with 2FA. The authenticator app codes are not being accepted.
resolution_notes: TOTP secret regenerated for affected users. QR codes re-sent. Authenticator app sync confirmed.

title: Report generation times out for large datasets
description: When generating reports for more than 10,000 records, the system times out after 30 seconds.
resolution_notes: Report query optimized with materialized view. Large dataset exports now complete in under 10s.

title: File uploads failing for files larger than 10MB
description: Our team needs to upload files up to 50MB but uploads are failing. The error says 'Request entity too large'.
resolution_notes: File upload limit increased to 50MB. Added streaming upload support. Progress bar implemented.

title: Search functionality not returning all results
description: Our search is only returning 80% of expected results. Some recently created items are not showing up.

title: Notification preferences not saving correctly
description: When we change notification settings, they revert after logging out. This is happening to all users.
resolution_notes: Notification service refactored to use event-driven architecture. Preferences now persist correctly.
